ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was made */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the release, including version number */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the release is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes and improvements in the release */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the documentation related to the release */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility setting for the release (e.g., Free Plan users only) */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes made in the release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or important information about the release */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the release (e.g., planned, in progress, released, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the release was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the release */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product or feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product or feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., user management, data integration) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "plan" TEXT /* User plan (e.g., Free Plan, Premium Plan) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user-specific permissions */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the release */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
